name: Light Pill #27 - The Question Asker
description: The Question Asker - A glowing capsule that reveals the power of inquiry and teaches the art of uncovering deeper truths through purposeful questioning. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Deep blue scholar's robes with question mark patterns in silver thread
Quill that writes questions that answer themselves
Leather boots that seek new paths of inquiry
Library of unasked questions with floating scrolls of inquiry
The right question is more powerful than all the answers in the world, for it opens doors that facts can only describe.

You must ask three questions that have no easy answers - one that challenges your deepest belief, one that reveals what you truly fear, and one that points toward your unrealized potential. The silence after each question will teach you more than any answer could.
Must be taken while contemplating a meaningful question

properties.ai_prompt: Intellectual fashion editorial of The Question Asker in a library of unasked questions with floating scrolls, wearing deep blue scholar's robes with silver question mark patterns, writing with a quill that creates glowing questions in the air. Inquisitive Blue aura with Curious Pulse energy, leather boots standing at a crossroads of inquiry, cinematic lighting that highlights the space between question and answer, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible thought patterns and floating queries.
